name: 25 Foot Round Steel Light Pole | 4 Inches Wide | 11 Gauge
description: Our 25 foot round steel light poles are 4 inches square and come with a removable pole cap. The 25 ft steel light pole is hot-dip galvanized and powder coated architectural bronze in color. Our 25 ft light pole uses 11 gauge steel. Round steel poles are commonly used for parking lots. Comes with a 2 3/8 Tenon. Bolt Circle range 8-10 In, bolt size 3/4x17x3 In, 2 sides of the pole shaft are predrilled and hole plugs included. POLE ACCESSORIES: 4 Piece ANCHOR BOLT SET 2 Piece BASECOVER 8 WASHERS 8 NUTS TEMPLATE (set plate) TOP COVER SIDE HAND HOLE COVE
short_desc: Key Features: Height: 25 ft Gauge: 11 Width: 4 in round Weight: 139 lbs Bolt Circle: 8 in – 10 in Bolt Projection: 2.75 in EPA Rating 70 mph: 11.8 EPA Rating 80 mph: 8.9 EPA Rating 90 mph: 7.7 EPA Rating 100 mph: 6.1 EPA Rating 110 mph: 5.6 EPA Rating 120 mph: 4.2 Warranty: 1 Year
